creator: wxs@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Wed, Jul 08, 2009 at 12:35:40AM +0200, Mohacsi Janos wrote:
> Dear FreeBSD commiters,
>  	Here I send the patch for upgrade net-mgmt/nfsen to 1.3.2.
> 
> Janos Mohacsi
> Network Engineer, Research Associate, Head of Network Planning and Projects
> NIIF/HUNGARNET, HUNGARY
> Key 70EF9882: DEC2 C685 1ED4 C95A 145F  4300 6F64 7B00 70EF 9882

Thanks, I'll commit this change in a day or so.

I noticed you're sending this mail from a new address. Would you like me
to update your ports to use this address?

-- WXS
